summary: Tested 4 new Kamboj Press features end-to-end: Customer balance column, /balance page, inline status dropdown in Production Queue, Excel (.xlsx) backup download. Backend pytest 9/9 passed. Frontend Playwright flow (login → sidebar → customers → balance → queue inline status → settings backup download) passed completely.
critical_code_review_comments: Backup endpoint is registered on both `@app.get('/backup')` and `@api.get('/backup')` (server.py line 838-839). Only the /api one is reachable through the ingress; the /backup duplicate is dead code and should be removed for clarity.
Same dual-registration pattern exists for `/stats` (line 854-855). Consider cleaning up to avoid confusion and inadvertent unauthenticated exposure on the non-/api route.

/api/customers aggregates balance by streaming all orders for the matched customer ids — fine for current scale but could become an N customers × orders scan as data grows. Future optimisation: a mongo aggregation pipeline grouping by customer_id with $sum.
Balance.jsx and StatusQueue.jsx both fetch the full orders list and compute totals on the client. Acceptable for now; if order volume crosses ~2000 consider pagination/server-side filtering.
/api/orders/balance/list serializes ALL orders (find().to_list(2000)) then filters in Python — could be a $expr filter at Mongo level, but current dataset size is fine.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, sidebar order, customers balance, /balance page incl. search & row click, queue inline status update with toast + row removal, xlsx download with valid PK header)

seed_data_creation: Test order TEST_StatusCustomer/9000000111 with product TEST_Item created and deleted by tests. One leftover Pending product was status-changed to Ready during the UI flow (verified row disappeared from Pending queue and toast 'Status updated' shown).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and cover: customers total_balance, /orders/balance/list (shape, sorting, auth), PATCH /orders/{id}/products/{id} (valid + invalid status), /backup (xlsx magic bytes + admin guard), /stats, /orders. Frontend Playwright verified: sidebar ordering Reminders→Balance→Customers; customer-balance-<id> data-testids render with rose/emerald colour; balance-page summary cards (count/outstanding) & balance-search-input filter; inline-status-<product_id> select calls PATCH and row disappears from current queue with success toast; export-backup-btn delivers a real xlsx (PK header verified, 10.5KB sample). Backup downloaded filename: press-order-book-backup-YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS.xlsx. No service restarts were needed.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found in this iteration.
